title: KubeJS Additions
description: This mod aims to provide pack makers with additional functionality not in KubeJS already. A key feature is that it allows you to listen to any arbitrary Fabric or Architectury Event, making the event listening possibilities endless!
body:
### KubeJS Additions adds more events and methods to KubeJS to make it easier for pack creators to do things such as toggling force-loaded chunks or getting ticking chunks, adding additional checks for blocks and entities, adding player stats, toggling a player's elytra, messing with JEI and more!

### You can now listen to any Fabric or Arch event in 1.18.2 or 1.19.2

## Examples and documentation for this mod can be found on [GitHub here](https://github.com/Hunter19823/kubejsadditions#kubejs-additions)

## You can also find a full list of examples for listening to arch and fabric events on KubeJS's discord in [this thread](https://discord.com/channels/303440391124942858/1107116692997423124).
